title: Harris Walls and Ceilings Corner Replacement Roller Sleeve
features: Easy to use: Convenient and simple use
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Ultimate Corner Roller Sleeve Contains 1 x Ultimate Corner Roller Sleeve After care After use with water based paints, such as emulsion, remove the excess paint. Then wash in warm soapy water until all paint is removed. Allow to dry standing up. For use with the Ultimate Corner Roller This corner roller sleeve has been specifically designed and engineered to get the ultimate finish when painting in corners with emulsion paints. Superior finish in corners. With splatter control for less mess. Replacement sleeve for Ultimate Corner Roller. Suggested use For use with the Ultimate Corner Roller. Designed to bring a smooth rollered finish right into a corner. For use with emulsion paints. For best results, rinse roller sleeve before use to remove any loose fibres. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier
